storyInfo: A warrior is refused a challenge by the Black Knight, and decides to investigate her 'secrets' in Kjerag, hoping to guarantee a match.

attributes.content: A knight softly sighs on the terrace of a Kjerag bar.
Harsh winds these days, friend. Best you don't stay out there too long.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Something up? Why all the sighs? Aren't you on vacation?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Ah... I'm fine.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I've been in Kjerag for just a few days now, but whenever I'm outside, kids circle up to point and laugh at me. Little tiring is all.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Haha, they don't mean anything by it. You're a Kazimierzian knight, no?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Some of your people've been showing off in Kjerag recently, and the kids want to try on your armor.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: This standard issue competition armor? It's not exactly high-end stuff...
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Competition...? Are you here for the Black Knight, maybe?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Oh? You know the Black Knight?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Of course. All Kjerag knows her. Couldn't find you a single soul here who hasn't met her.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: What is she into? Or what makes her angry? What does she actually care about?!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: ...I'm actually a fan. I want to know everything about her.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Settle down, fella. Ask away, I know her well enough.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: If she weren't so busy I'd figure a way to let you meet her, even.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: What keeps somebody busy in Kjerag?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Don't believe the foreign nonsense, 'Kjerag's so poor it only has snow' now, you hear?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Look at the newly built streets out there. Kjerag is changing by the day, and we have lots of places needing more hands.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: It's true some spots are still a little poor, but one day, each and every one of Kjeragandr's people will rise up from the valleys.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: But that time isn't now, is it?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Heheh, that's where you're wrong. Now, when everything's starting up, is the most interesting of times.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: So you're telling me, the legendary Black Knight has been busy laying bricks in Kjerag?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Uh... Actually, I haven't a clue what she's been up to lately.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: I haven't seen her in the city for a while now. Been a while since our last chat.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Sounds like you aren't that close to her.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: It would seem that way...
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Another sigh on the terrace.
Truth be told, I met the Black Knight yesterday. It was our second meeting.
Many years ago when I had just become a competition knight, the General Chamber told me my debut fight wouldn't be in the arena.
They wanted us to rush over to the city outskirts, to intercept and prevent a determined and unstoppable warrior from leaving.
Fortunately, the younger me only happened to spot her from afar, before she kicked a little rock in my direction, hitting me square in the head.
I woke up in the hospital and eavesdropped on the gossiping nurses, where I learned the others had gotten hit by her greatsword instead.
And their fates were beyond miserable.

attributes.text: It was then that I knew, the Black Knight would be the focus of my life—
My goal, is to defeat her.

attributes.content: <p=2>Yesterday...</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: What exactly do you want?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Heh heh. I didn't think you'd remember me.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I don't.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But you've been dallying here for so long, you're interrupting my work.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Then let me tell you of a young knight, many years ago, on the outskirts of Kazimierz—
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: What?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Put the fowlbeasts down first!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Degenbrecher stops in her tracks and sizes up Chilly Knight. In her arms rest four or five fowlbeasts, with many more scurrying around her on the ground, letting out the occasional cry.
...Never mind. I'll keep it brief.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Because of you, I've endured years of humiliation and hardship. I finally made a name for myself in the arena, becoming a well-known knight with a string of victories under my belt.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: All for one reason: a real match against you, here and now!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: ...You even brought a camera with you?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Afraid I'll capture the Black Knight's pathetic defeat? Heh—
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Draw your greatsword! I'll take it you accept my challenge so long as you brandish it!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: She... looks away? Before the Chilly Knight can even wonder why, Degenbrecher suddenly bends down to scoop up a fowlbeast that has dashed over to her feet.
You should go. Stop bothering me with this nonsense.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I didn't think 'The Black Knight of Kazimierz' would refuse a fight...
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Did the Darksteels wound your courage along with your body?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: A fight? Each and every one of you comes with cameras in hand. I suspect you're just trying to get some B-roll for your commercials.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I'm retired, so think whatever you want. Don't get in my way.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: So... you're just willingly staying here in the depths of this old forest, following orders and doing pointless busywork?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Any stalwart local could deal with these runaway fowlbeasts.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Don't we competition knights... no, don't all warriors exist to duel and push ourselves to the limit?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Are you done?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Let me through.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: While Chilly Knight is busy rambling away, Degenbrecher has managed to capture all the fowlbeasts, and briskly walks past her agitated visitor without even returning a glance.
...I'll bring your true self back! You will draw your blade, Black Knight!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Madam Degenbrecher—I-I finally found—
attributes.name: Kjerag Elder

attributes.content: Calm down. Did Hans wander off again?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Hans?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Phew... Of course you'd know!
attributes.name: Kjerag Elder

attributes.content: I'll look for him once I'm done returning these fowlbeasts. Give me a moment.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Your grandson lost or something?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: What? Grandson? Hans is my outpost burdenbeast.
attributes.name: Kjerag Elder

attributes.content: To such a trivial matter, the Black Knight nods with a smile. As he thinks about the cold and dismissive attitude she showed him...
Chilly Knight clenches his fists.
Kurwa!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: The sudden display of anger startles the barkeep, drawing the other customers' curious looks.
...Sorry, sorry. I lost my cool.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: All good. I don't even know what that 'coo-vah' means.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Many tourists come to Kjerag just to let off steam, you know? Run off into the mountains, yell their hearts out. Why not give it a try?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: But the Black Knight lingers on my mind... Right, do you know anything else about her?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Hm, let me think... Many years ago, when she was still new here, the old boss would ask her for help whenever we had too many supplies to deal with.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: I was just a nobody who helped out with odd jobs then, and had no inkling of her foreign fame. But one night...
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Yo, you're the knight or whatever they were talking about?
attributes.name: Kjerag Youth

attributes.content: A guy here told me you could drink from dusk till dawn, and still manage to walk straight back home.
attributes.name: Kjerag Youth

attributes.content: ...Who told you that?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Don't you worry about it. We're not going to give up our rep just yet, so don't even think about leaving the place if you can't drink past us!
attributes.name: Kjerag Youth

attributes.content: I have one condition: All of you write down your home addresses on a piece of paper first.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Easy!
attributes.name: Kjerag Youth

attributes.content: Wait, what did she want with their addresses?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Slow down, pal.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Those punks regretted the challenge after the first mug. Degenbrecher finished a bottle in two chugs without even pausing.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: They started to play dirty, saying they'd take turns against the Black Knight, but she was downing mug after mug for two hours straight.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: By then, all the drunken louts were passed out on the floor, and she carried them back to the outpost.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Only then did I realize what she wanted the addresses for. No one ever dared to bother her like that again. Haha.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: ...An incredible story, but that doesn't tell me about her interests or character.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Don't you get it? She loves booze most of all! How else would she have won the drinking contest?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Well...
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Hah, just listen to him babble. The man is practically a stranger to her.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: *sigh* Fine, if you're so chummy with her, share some wisdom, will you?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: I sure will!
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Listen to me, buddy. Know what Degenbrecher loves the most?
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Angling.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Madam Degenbrecher, you've been here for almost a whole day now.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: It's fine to go back empty handed. This is your second try at fincatching after all.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: No, I haven't...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Come on now, I'll give you some lures next time, you'll surely—
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Quiet!
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The pole moved.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Degenbrecher wields the rod as coolly as if it were a blade in her hands. She holds her breath, then swiftly flicks upward—
Only the hook remains on the line, with the bait nowhere to be seen.
Ah, don't worry about it. There's always next time.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Madam?!
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: ...When she emerged from the lake holding a huge finbeast, she won all of our respect.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: After all, someone who never fails to catch is someone we can ask for the occasional spare meat.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Of course, she eventually improved her angling skills, but that's a story for another time.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: Nuh-uh!
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: When did you get in here, girl? Out with you!
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Let me finish! I've seen Degenbrecher releasing the fins she caught back into the lake.
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: She loves all the little animals here.
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: Surely she likes hunting more?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: No, no!
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: Degenbrecher!
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: Are your parents out?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Uh, are you looking for them?
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: ...I was passing by and remembered delivering some medicine here three months ago. For your sickly baby cystybeast.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Is it better now?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Yeah... oh, careful—
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: A cystybeast charges straight for Degenbrecher—then shakes its head in pain as she remains completely still.
The shocked girl watches as Degenbrecher crouches down to stroke the cystybeast's neck, and gradually calms it down.
...It's grown so big in such a short time.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I'm glad.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Ever seen somebody get rammed by a cystybeast and shrug it off like nothing happened?
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: She comforted it for a good while, and even reminded me to feed it when she left.
attributes.name: Local Girl

attributes.content: Heh, you're belittling her with the animal lover talk.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: You think the same? Exactly, how could the Black Knight possibly be into such things!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Degenbrecher has a secret only a select few know.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Madam Degenbrecher?
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: What are you doing sitting in the snow?
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: I have a rare pocket of spare time today, so I wanted to find a quiet place to relax.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: If there's nothing you need my help with—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Ah, of course.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: I know! She was practicing her swordplay in the snow, yearning to return to her competition days, but she didn't want to show off to the locals.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Of course not.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Then, what...?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I'm sure of it—
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: She was ready to become a follower of Kjeragandr!
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Thank Kjeragandr, for Degenbrecher is definitely one of us.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Wait, what does that have to do with your Kjeragandr?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Kjeragandr taught us that meditating in the snowy mountains is a way to attain wisdom.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Even a woman as remarkable as Degenbrecher is sure to find new insights this way.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: So, young man. If you wish to understand Degenbrecher, you ought to study Kjerag's culture.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: In the dark of night, the crowd has long gone home, leaving only the barkeep wiping down glasses as Chilly Knight remains seated by the window, in silence.
Didn't get your answer?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: ...I prepared for over a decade, just to defeat the Black Knight.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: News spread about how she showed her might to the Victorians, so I decided to rush over to Kjerag immediately after my arena fights.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I didn't expect the invincible Black Knight to be reduced to a country bumpkin, displaying only the most trivial of interests.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I suppose the talk of her facing the Victorians was just baseless gossip spread by troublemakers.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: What makes you say that? I wasn't there myself, but there were plenty of witnesses. Why not go ask around again—
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Save it!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: ...Sorry, but I haven't heard a shred of truth from anyone here the past few days.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: A warrior's obsession may seem strange to outsiders, but I won't force you to understand either.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Since the Black Knight has willingly shed her glory, I'll take my leave. Thank you for your hospitality.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Alright, alright.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: But come on, friend. Look at the weather outside. That's Kjerag for 'incoming blizzard'.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Why not stay one more night? I'll give you a discount with a bottle on the house, so you can leave Kjerag with a good impression.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: A plain old blizzard isn't much to me. I'm used to navigating harsh weather.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Well, you don't know the blizzards here often come with avalanches.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: So how do you deal with them? I'll learn.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Deal? Haha. We just accept our fates, save for Degenbrecher.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: It's been a few years since Karlan Trade installed a warning system. Now they ban people from going up the mountain when they detect a potential avalanche.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: But she doesn't care. The worse the weather, the deeper into the mountains she goes, to see which one's making trouble.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: She'll find the right spot, and with a few huffs at the falling snow, everything's settled in a blink.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: I was lucky enough to witness it twice. Heheheh. Much more exciting than watching recordings of her fights in Kazimierz.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: So you mean, she drew her greatsword and countered the avalanche with her martial prowess?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Sword? I don't know what method exactly, but she did look all ready to fight.
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: ...Are you pulling my leg?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Hmph! I swear by Kjeragandr, it's all true!
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: May She bury me in the snow if I utter a single lie! So deep that Degenbrecher can't find me!
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Then—
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Do you have any mountaineering gear here, sir?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: What, you don't wanna leave anymore?
attributes.name: Barkeep

attributes.content: Chilly Knight turns around to look out the window, towards the distant snow-capped peaks merging with the dark clouds into a vast haze.
I changed my mind.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Kjerag is indeed a wonderful place.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: The blizzard descends. Every household in Kjerag bolts their doors and windows shut, ready to weather Kjeragandr's ordeal.
Among the snow-covered mounts is but a single soul still wandering the peaks.
This is a rare 'break' for Degenbrecher, all along on a winding mountain path with no one else in sight. The cold and wind only help to clear her mind.
She lifts her head, waiting for an opportunity.
Here it comes.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: She quickens her steps, leaving a trail of footprints going forward. Her heels halt beneath blocks of snow shaking atop a single solitary peak.
Heh—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: A snow block falls, and she steps forward, drawing the dual degenbrechers at her waist, she aggressively swings at a waterfall of snow, turning it into tiny snowflakes behind her.
Until she sees within the falling snow... a dark figure, dropping down from on high.
What?!
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Shortly after, a muffled, yet familiar voice comes from the snow.
Kurwa!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Pfft, bleh, argh!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: My helmet's full of snow now *cough* Skurwysyny Kjerag!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You again.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I didn't think I'd hear Kazimierzian profanity here...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Chilly Knight is still shaking the snow off his body as he turns to the source of the voice—the Degenbrecher he was hoping to find, with weapons in hand.
The Black Knight!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I knew you'd return. Now this is the real you!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Degenbrecher looks at her own weapons and realizes something.
Don't get the wrong idea now...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I, Chilly Knight, with—Kjeragandr as my witness, accept your challenge!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: May your blade be swift!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Where's that greatsword of yours?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Why the two sticks?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I'm in no mood for your attempt at comedy.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Was that avalanche your doing?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Pretty good! Yes, that was me!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: An outsider and troublemaker starting an avalanche is perhaps reason enough to wield my degenbrechers.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: We may be surrounded by snow, but falling all the way down from such a height will leave you injured.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: A flesh wound won't stop me.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I waited over a decade for this moment, and any flaws in my plan can be patched afterward. The whole of Kazimierz will know of my valiant victory over the Black Knight!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You have a death wish, then.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: As Chilly Knight presses record on his camera, the Black Knight leaps forward, swinging her weapons as she did years ago.
Their weapons clash repeatedly as Degenbrecher forces her challenger down to the foot of the small mountain. Chilly Knight grits his teeth, and leaps up from the dead end he was forced into—
His opponent's slightly late swing smashes into the mountain, sending rock flying everywhere.
She follows up with a kick, sending a small stone flying at Chilly Knight, as she had many years ago on the outskirts of Kazimierz. He flicks his blade, slicing it into two.
The knight walks back up the mountain as Degenbrecher returns to a fighting stance as they face each other once more.
I knew it.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I'm not the only one who remembers that fateful day.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Our first meeting. On the outskirts of Kazimierz, you kicked some rubble in my direction and struck me in the head.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I don't know what you're talking about.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Haha. Even if your actions have just betrayed your thoughts?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Unfortunately, in the days since we last met, I've become more than an easy target for you to manipulate at will.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I'll send this next strike straight through your heart!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You won't.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: You turned an avalanche into a farce.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Immersing yourself in delusion for too long will only dull your mind.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Hahahaha. The Black Knight dares to boast of force! This is truly—
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: A faint rumble interrupts his sentence. The knight looks up, and realizes their fight has triggered a new avalanche. A waterfall of snow crashes down with boulders in tow.
Stones collide with metal, and a few momentary muffled screams follow, leaving Chilly Knight collapsed on the ground and submerged in snow.
*cough* *cough*... I expected no less of a three-time champion.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Could the tournaments be easier now than they once were...?
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Becoming a victim of the Black Knight's blade—rods, I mean, is my honor.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You don't deserve death.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But Kjerag will no longer welcome you after deliberately causing an avalanche. You'll be exiled.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: No, wait.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You're still so powerful, even now, Black Knight. If you return to Kazimierz, you can claim back your championship title at will.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: You might not know it, but the competition scene has been declining ever since the Radiant Knight retired. There are many looking forward to your return. The General Chamber of Commerce has even issued a statement that they're willing to make some concessions for you.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: I already told you, I'm retired. No matter what Kazimierz offers me, I'm not going back.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But... alright, say Kazimierz's out of the question. There are many more places that could use your might.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: So why here? There's nothing but snow and mountains!
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Even a man as foolish as I knows a warrior's life only sees value from fighting for as long as we can.
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: Are you so content to waste your life in Kjerag? Could it be, you actually believe the nonsense written in those scriptures? *cough* *cough*
attributes.name: Chilly Knight

attributes.content: ...That's enough. Save your energy.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: What is the value of a Leithanian who cannot use Arts?
Degenbrecher had no answer for this, and so she took her scrappy equipment all the way to Kazimierz. There and then, she thought the 'Glorious Land of the Knights' could give her an answer.
It was rare for her to experience failure, even in her younger days, and her successive victories only solidified her belief that the answer lay in a future arena.
Until she reached the peak with no one left to fight, and no meaningful answers either.
Some Kazimierzians told her, enjoying opulence is what drives them. Her desires would outgrow what she could gain.
Trying to understand this took more energy than her actual fights. All her experiences only made her certain that in the end the so-called 'excellent life' was absolutely boring.
Any grand pretense was only born from the desire to continue living, striving to spice up a boring life.
...No, the most important thing I gained in Kazimierz was the refusal to believe in any lofty ideals.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: When I realized Kazimierz only gave me egregiously packaged vanity, I chose to leave.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: As for the 'pure duel' you lot love to talk about... I only found it when I first faced off against an avalanche here.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: When I rescued avalanche victims off the mountains, I knew that is where I'd stay.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: So if you can't get this into your head—
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The competition knight is nowhere to be seen, replaced by a mysterious, crude 'snowman'.
Degenbrecher softly sighs, and knocks away the snowman's head, revealing a familiar metal helmet.
There is no response, but warm steam escaping from the helmet vents indicates the presence of life within.
As usual, the locals wait for Degenbrecher to return from the mountain where the avalanche occurred, but today she comes back with a man on her shoulder.
Glad you're late, Madam. I bet my friends you wouldn't be on time today.
attributes.name: Excited Local

attributes.content: It's best not to mess with an avalanche at all. Kjeragandr's wrath is not so easy to forecast.
attributes.name: Pious Local

attributes.content: Degenbrecher nods. Perhaps she has not noticed it, but she has long since grown used to responding to the locals' concern for her wellbeing.
Madam Degenbrecher!
attributes.name: Kjerag Elder

attributes.content: Thank you for finding Hans. Now we're back to business.
attributes.name: Kjerag Elder

attributes.content: Perfect, I just so happen to need this man sent to the station. Get him back to Kazimierz.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: That's where he belongs.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher
